description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: a build job that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/offa/docker-images/${COMPILER}:${VERSION} and runs in a parallel matrix over COMPILER (gcc, clang) and VERSION (gcc:15,14; clang:21,20), executing script/ci_setup.sh then script/ci_build.sh -asan -ubsan; a coverage job that uses the gcc:15 image, runs script/ci_setup.sh and script/ci_build.sh -cov, and captures coverage using the regex /^\s*lines:\s*\d+.\d+\%/; and a formatting job that runs on docker:latest with before_script installing git, cloning the clang-format-lint-action repository, building its Docker image, then runs docker run --rm --workdir /src -v ${PWD}:/src clang-format-lint --clang-format-executable /clang-format/clang-format${CLANGFORMAT_VERSION} -r --exclude .git ., using the CLANGFORMAT_VERSION variable set to 19 and the docker:dind service. Also define a global variable GTEST_COLOR='yes'.
